name: cls
description: Clear the entire screen with a single color from the palette. Call this at the beginning of _draw() to reset the screen before drawing your frame.
example:
function _draw()
    gfx.cls(0) -- clear with black
    print("hello!", 10, 10, 7)
end

name: rectf
description: Draw a filled rectangle on screen. Useful for UI elements, health bars, backgrounds, and simple geometric visuals.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X position of the top-left corner

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y position of the top-left corner

example:
function _draw()
    gfx.cls(1)
    -- draw a red health bar
    shape.rectf(10, 10, 100, 8, 8)
end

name: draw
description: Draw a sprite from the current spritesheet at the given position. Optionally flip it horizontally or vertically for animations and directional characters.

parameters.name: spriteIndex
parameters.description: Index of the sprite in the spritesheet

example:
function _draw()
    gfx.cls(0)
    spr.draw(0, player.x, player.y)
    -- draw facing left
    spr.draw(0, enemy.x, enemy.y, true)
end

name: pressing
description: Check if a key is currently being held down. Returns true every frame the key is pressed, unlike ctrl.pressed() which fires only once. Ideal for continuous movement.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Key constant from the keys table (e.g. keys.left, keys.right, keys.space)

example:
function _update()
    if ctrl.pressing(keys.left) then
        player.x = player.x - 2
    end
    if ctrl.pressing(keys.right) then
        player.x = player.x + 2
    end
end
